_schema_notes.UserID: String — Lex session ID or hashed (risk+amount+horizon)
_schema_notes.RiskLevel: String — low | medium | high (stored but not indexed)
_schema_notes.Amount: String — Investment amount in USD (stored as string for DynamoDB compat)
_schema_notes.Horizon: String — Time horizon in trading days
_schema_notes.NumStocks: String — Number of stocks selected after sentiment filter
_schema_notes.Stocks: String — JSON array of ticker symbols
_schema_notes.SentimentFiltered: String — 'true' if Comprehend filter was applied
_schema_notes.SentimentReport: String — JSON array of per-ticker sentiment scores (optional)

deployment_steps: 1. Open AWS Console → DynamoDB → Tables → Create table
7. Attach DynamoDB PutItem/GetItem/Query policy to LambdaRoboAdvisorRole
